reading.title: Reading: Review — The future of the city
reading.passage: The population is going to grow quickly. The city will probably be the busiest city in the region, but maybe not as crowded as the capital. Many people are planning to move to the suburbs because they are quieter and more peaceful than the city centre.

questions.question: The city will be as crowded as the capital.
questions.explanation: "maybe not as crowded as the capital".

questions.question: Why are people moving to the suburbs?
options: They are quieter and more peaceful
questions.correct: They are quieter and more peaceful
questions.explanation: "because they are quieter and more peaceful than the city centre."

reading.title: Reading: Traffic and office rules
reading.passage: You must wear a helmet on a motorbike, and you mustn't ride without one. Drivers must stop at a red light, and they mustn't use their phone while driving. At the office, employees must arrive on time, and they mustn't smoke inside the building.

questions.question: It is forbidden to ride a motorbike without a helmet.
Drivers can use their phone while driving.
questions.explanation: "they mustn't use their phone while driving."
